> A US$49 USD payment <https://59.email.stripe.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fdashboard.stripe.com%2Fb%2Facct_1O0lAFDOl8P0Ke60%3Fdestination=%252Fpayments%252Fpi_3T9CfiDOl8P0Ke600OinjqWt/1/0101019cf9d70eab-eff09706-661f-4a56-8905-416981f029fc-000000/98Kp_2iwewfqFeae1CiwGJuki7GXy1XHclbz87ojCXo=448> for ShipYup, Inc. is being disputed by Commonwealth Bank of Australia because your customer says they didn't initiate this purchase (this is known as a fraudulent transaction).	
>  
>  
>  
>  
> If you don't agree with this dispute, you can submit evidence to counter it. A dispute countered fee <https://59.email.stripe.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fstripe.com%2Fpricing/1/0101019cf9d70eab-eff09706-661f-4a56-8905-416981f029fc-000000/1Z1gGca0KRN8rfipj3-5lnM29HhdT_po-GaWLnrVWs8=448> applies to counter this dispute, in addition to the dispute received fee. If you win the dispute, the dispute countered fee is returned to you.	
>  
>  
>  
>  
> The disputed amount and the dispute received fee <https://59.email.stripe.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fstripe.com%2Fpricing/2/0101019cf9d70eab-eff09706-661f-4a56-8905-416981f029fc-000000/HC_TwBcnRf02IZHd63XbETuAHoRibh1JWF0OzhPRqGE=448> have been debited from your balance.	
>  
>  
>  
>  
> If the dispute is eligible for Smart Disputes, Stripe will automatically compile evidence on your behalf. You can check eligibility in the dashboard and choose to counter immediately or if you don't take any action, Stripe will automatically counter the dispute at the time the response is due. The dispute countered fee will be waived if you counter with Smart Disputes. You can still accept the dispute or submit evidence manually if you wish.	
>  
>  
>  
>

comments.body:
![Stripe](https://stripe-images.s3.amazonaws.com/html_emails/2023-03-30/header/stripe_logo_blurple_email_highres.png)







  A US$49 USD payment for ShipYup, Inc. is being disputed by Commonwealth Bank of Australia because your customer says they didn't initiate this purchase (this is known as a fraudulent transaction).






  If you don't agree with this dispute, you can submit evidence to counter it. A dispute countered fee applies to counter this dispute, in addition to the dispute received fee. If you win the dispute, the dispute countered fee is returned to you.






  The disputed amount and the dispute received fee have been debited from your balance.






  If the dispute is eligible for Smart Disputes, Stripe will automatically compile evidence on your behalf. You can check eligibility in the dashboard and choose to counter immediately or if you don't take any action, Stripe will automatically counter the dispute at the time the response is due. The dispute countered fee will be waived if you counter with Smart Disputes. You can still accept the dispute or submit evidence manually if you wish.






  For more information, visit our full disputes documentation.












DISPUTE INFORMATION


Dispute ID
du_1TBoIrDOl8P0Ke60Mq8VjAO8

Customer email
peptidelabsaustralia@gmail.com

Reason
Fraudulent

Last day to submit evidence
April 1, 2026


View in Dashboard











  Helpful resources






  How to respond to each type of dispute






  Best practices when submitting evidence






  Preventing disputes






  What is Smart Disputes






  We're sorry you're facing this dispute, but we're here to help every step of the way. You can find answers to common dispute questionson our support site, and if you have further questions you can contact us for help.






  Thank you,
The Stripe team








  This email relates to your ShipYup, Inc. Stripe account.

comments.html_body:
A US$49 USD payment for ShipYup, Inc. is being disputed by Commonwealth Bank of Australia because your customer says they didn't initiate this purchase (this is known as a fraudulent transaction).
 
 
 
 
If you don't agree with this dispute, you can submit evidence to counter it. A dispute countered fee applies to counter this dispute, in addition to the dispute received fee. If you win the dispute, the dispute countered fee is returned to you.
 
 
 
 
The disputed amount and the dispute received fee have been debited from your balance.
 
 
 
 
If the dispute is eligible for Smart Disputes, Stripe will automatically compile evidence on your behalf. You can check eligibility in the dashboard and choose to counter immediately or if you don't take any action, Stripe will automatically counter the dispute at the time the response is due. The dispute countered fee will be waived if you counter with Smart Disputes. You can still accept the dispute or submit evidence manually if you wish.
 
 
 
 
For more information, visit our full disputes documentation.
 
 
 
 
 
 
DISPUTE INFORMATION

We're sorry you're facing this dispute, but we're here to help every step of the way. You can find answers to common dispute questionson our support site, and if you have further questions you can contact us for help.
 
 
 
 
Thank you, 
The Stripe team

comments.body:
Hello Carl,

I hope you are doing well.

I am Keerthi, Customer Success Manager at PluginHive.

I am reaching out regarding the dispute raised for the $49 USD monthly subscription charge related to _**PluginHive WooCommerce Shipping Services**_ plugin.

I also attempted to contact you on your number (+61 422 845 042) and I am sending this email as per your request.

I wanted to check if you would like to continue using our solution. The concern you had previously with the AuPost label generation has also been addressed, and the solution should work smoothly for you.

**If the dispute was not raised intentionally, and would like to continue using the solution, we kindly request that you either withdraw the dispute with your bank or confirm your intent to continue by replying to this email.**

We can then share your confirmation with Stripe from our end.

However, if you prefer not to continue using the plugin, we completely understand. In that case, we can proceed with canceling your subscription and issuing a refund for the recent transaction.

We look forward to hearing from you and resolving any concerns you may have.

Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive | Customer Success Manager
comments.html_body:
Hello Carl,
 
I hope you are doing well.
 
I am Keerthi, Customer Success Manager at PluginHive.
 
I am reaching out regarding the dispute raised for the $49 USD monthly subscription charge related to PluginHive WooCommerce Shipping Services plugin.
 
I also attempted to contact you on your number (+61 422 845 042) and I am sending this email as per your request.
 
I wanted to check if you would like to continue using our solution. The concern you had previously with the AuPost label generation has also been addressed, and the solution should work smoothly for you.
 
If the dispute was not raised intentionally, and would like to continue using the solution, we kindly request that you either withdraw the dispute with your bank or confirm your intent to continue by replying to this email.
 
We can then share your confirmation with Stripe from our end.
 
However, if you prefer not to continue using the plugin, we completely understand. In that case, we can proceed with canceling your subscription and issuing a refund for the recent transaction.
 
We look forward to hearing from you and resolving any concerns you may have.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
PluginHive | Customer Success Manager

comments.body:
Hello,



What is your issue. Your product hasn't worked correctly for many months and still after I waited months for you to get it to work when it was tried again with your staff helping it was a nightmare and totally didnt work, so I am not paying you any money for a faulty product period.



I was a good customer for a long time and you made good money out of me but you couldnt get your software to work correctly for 3 months.



So there's absolutely nothing to talk about. In fact you owe me more money for taking money form my account without my knowledge while you were spending months trying to fix your software so I could do a simply thing like print more than 5 labels at a time.




Regards

**Carl Grein**

Mobile/WhatsApp: +61 (0) 422 845 042






 ![](https://mailtrack.io/trace/mail/543ef19585575a74ab28a700d4b75121daa15102.png?u=4405715)

comments.body:
Hello Carl,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us.

We strive to provide the best possible experience for all our customers, and we are genuinely sorry that this didn’t meet your expectations. We understand your concerns and appreciate the time you’ve taken to provide detailed feedback.

Please note that your subscription has been canceled on our side, and no further charges will be applied moving forward.

Since the dispute has been raised, the resolution will be handled directly by Stripe, and the case will be closed according to their standard process.

We truly value the time you’ve spent with PluginHive and wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Best regards,
Keerthi
Customer Success Manager
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Carl,

I understand, and I am really sorry we weren’t able to resolve the concerns to your satisfaction.

I’d like to reassure you that all your subscriptions are fully canceled, and no future charges will be applied.

Since the dispute is already in progress, Stripe will take it forward from here as per their standard process.

Thank you for your time with us, and I wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Best regards,
Keerthi
Customer Success Manager
PluginHive
